scenario: Ask the user for a number and print whether it is even or odd.
Create a list with the numbers 2, 4, 6 and print the first item.
Ask the user for a word and print the length of the word.
Create a list of three favourite foods and print each one using a for loop.
Ask the user for a number and print all numbers from 1 to that number.
Ask the user for a sentence and print it in uppercase.
Create a list of three colours then add another colour to the end and print the list.
Ask the user for their first name and last name, then print them together on one line.
solution_code:
first = input("Enter your first name: ")
last = input("Enter your last name: ")
print(first + " " + last)

scenario: Ask the user for a number and print its square (number multiplied by itself).
solution_code:
num = int(input("Enter a number: "))
print(num * num)

scenario: Create a list of three animals and print how many animals are in the list.
